rulings.Case Title: JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL VS. SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 2, 2021 line 1. PETITIONER JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA, VIKRAMSIHN DEVDHARA MOTION TO TAX COSTS is GRANTED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: D 27 LLC VS. MARLENE J. CASISSA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 2, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT MARLENE J. CASISSA, IN TRUST,, MARLENE J. CASISSA, IN TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees is DENIED. The parties contracted to mediate the action in lieu of litigation to preserve their entitlement to recovery of fees. The parties further contracted that filing of a Court action in order to preserve the statute of limitations will not constitute a waiver or violation of mediation provisions. Despite multiple invitations to mediate the dispute starting April 2, 2020, defendant did not respond to any other them until January 5, 2021, 6 days before the action was dismissed and after significant amount of requested fees have been incurred. Based on the party's contract, Defendant should have proceeded to mediation (failure to respond to mediation request while proceeding with litigation is a tacit refusal) to preserve its entitlement to fees. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PONTE GADEA CALIFORNIA, LLC VS. OLD NAVY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended ANSWER to Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 2, 2021 line 3. PLAINTIFF PONTE GADEA CALIFORNIA, LLC DEMURRER to Amended ANSWER to Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Affirmative defenses are sufficiently stated to provide plaintiff notice and issues regarding applicability of COVID-19 triggered defenses shall be addressed at a later stage of the litigation where facts may properly be considered. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
